creator: vidar@karlsen.tech
text:
Created attachment 191382
How 'bout something like this?

Ok, this is a tad more than a minor change:
- removes a number of .if conditionals in favor of OPT_USES, OPT_LIB_DEPENDS etc.
- passes ${KRB5CONFIG} to the build so it actually builds against the right one
- gives the choice between GSSAPI_BASE GSSAPI_HEIMDAL and GSSAPI_MIT
